metadata.description: The first open-source, mobile-first personal health AI agent. Understands your nutrition, sleep, fitness, and becomes the health companion that knows you best.

hero.subtitle: The first open-source, mobile-first personal health AI agent — understands your nutrition, sleep, and fitness to become the health companion that knows you best

philosophy.quote2: an AI that truly understands you.
philosophy.desc1: Open Health is more than a tracking tool —
philosophy.desc2: it's a personal health AI that understands your diet, sleep, and fitness to become the companion that knows you best.
philosophy.tagline: Not another tracking app. It's your personal health AI.

features.desc01: AI analyzes your food diary, photo-recognizes nutrition labels, and estimates calories from a meal description. More than a tool — a health companion that learns you over time.
features.desc02: Diet, exercise, sleep, weight, water, fasting — no more juggling multiple apps. One platform covers all aspects of health, with data naturally connected.
features.desc03: Weight trends, nutrition intake, sleep quality, exercise performance — all at a glance. Make better decisions with an integrated perspective.
features.desc04: Your data is entirely yours, no lock-in, no paywalls. Open-source architecture, community-driven, anyone can contribute and extend.

install.ios02: Tap the share button at the bottom
install.android02: Tap the menu button ⋮ at the top right

blog.title: Health Knowledge Base
blog.subtitle: In-depth content on nutrition science, training methods, and sleep optimization.
